summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PIR Grain & Pulses commodity trading dashboard. All core functionality working correctly with minor issues identified.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for create operations
minor_issues.impact: Cosmetic - functionality works correctly, just wrong status code

ui_bugs.issue: Error message not displayed for invalid credentials

minor_issues.issue: Status filter selector has different data-testid than expected

passed_tests: Reference data endpoints (commodities, origins, ports, surveyors)
Dashboard loads with welcome message and KPI cards
Navigation to all pages (Trades, Partners, Vessels, Documents, Calendar, Commissions, Reports, Settings)
Partners sub-pages navigation (All, Buyers, Sellers, Co-Brokers)
Trades table displays correctly with data
Modal dialogs open and close correctly
Reports page shows charts and statistics
Settings page displays user profile information
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix login error message display for invalid credentials. Consider updating POST endpoints to return 201 status code for consistency.
